_doc: Default annotation style. Values here are used unless overridden in the annotation spec. On first run, Claude walks the user through onboarding to set preferences.
_accent_color_note: Set a hex color (#D97757) or 'auto' to pull from brand_context/design-tokens.md. Falls back to #D97757 if no tokens exist.
_detail_level_note: minimal = circles only, no legend. standard = circles + highlight boxes + legend. detailed = circles + boxes + legend + annotate every interactive element from elements.json.
_label_style_note: legend = numbered key strip below the image. inline = pill-shaped label rendered next to each circle on the image.
_legend_note: Append a key below the image showing what each numbered circle points to. Only applies when label_style is 'legend'.
_legend_position_note: bottom = strip below image. right = sidebar (not yet implemented).
